name_en: P 🌹 (Large) 2023 Autumn/Winter New Arrival 🍰 1BD328 is here. This System soft lambskin shoulder bag is embellished with a triangular pattern crafted with exquisite stitching, highlighting the brand's craftsmanship. The flap design features a chain handle that evokes jewelry associations / and is detachable. The front metal-engraved logo is outlined by the iconic triangular stitching, showcasing the brand's style. Can be carried by hand / shoulder / crossbody, highly functional 👍. If you like it, get yours now. Dimensions: 24 x 15 x 7.5cm 🎉🎉!
